calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Title To Personal Property
Off Calendar Mar-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Nelson appeared by CourtCall for petitioner Barbara Chew. No one appeared to object to the granting of the petition. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)

Petition For Order Determining Title To Personal Property

Petition For Order Determining Title To Personal Property

Petition For Order Determining Title To Personal Property
Off Calendar Apr-25-2016 Continued To Jun-06-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Nelson (via court call) for Barbara Chew.

The Court stated that the main issue is the possibility of obtaining the services of a firm to search for heirs. Mr. Nelson stated that they can do that, that it is an unnecessary expense, that he did the estate plan and was told that there were no heirs and that they can pay to do what the court is asking. The Court stated that it needs to make sure that due diligence is done. The petition for order determining title to personal property was continued to June 6, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Nelson is to file a declaration with the findings.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Determining Title To Personal Property
Off Calendar Apr-04-2016 Continued To Apr-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
